---
name: New dataset request
about: Suggest a new public dataset to add to the catalog
---

**Dataset name and source**
Name and public URL of the data source.

**Vertical**
Credit & Lending / Capital Markets / Macro & Central Bank / Tax & Income

**Why it's useful**
What ML tasks or research would this enable?

**Aggregate statistics available**
Link to published summary statistics (the seed builder needs means, stds, category frequencies — not individual records).
